2026-04-03T07:52:10.0191404Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-04-03T07:52:10.0191665Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-04-03T07:52:10.0191812Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-03T07:52:10.0192012Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-03T07:52:10.0192355Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-03T07:52:10.0192465Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-04-03T07:52:10.0192748Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-04-03T07:52:10.0192828Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-04-03T07:52:10.0193007Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-04-03T07:52:10.0193083Z [36;1mfi[0m
